content: An AI Agent Marketplace can be structured as a distributed, attention-weighted episodic memory system, where each listed AI agent acts as a stored memory trace that only activates when attention is allocated to it via buyer search queries matching the agent's specialization. Curiosity-driven ICM agents that autonomously explore new capability domains can continuously add new memory traces to this system, keeping the collective memory of the marketplace dynamic and up-to-date.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
